subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of the most sacred and exalted sanctuary of the Desired One, Who through the Supreme Word created His emissaries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که از کلمه علیا سفرا خلق نمود
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @law of pilgrimage, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
